description: The biostatistics team requires an interim data extract for the Phase II Diabetes Trial (DM-TRIAL-2024). In OpenClinica (login: root / Admin123!), create a dataset definition named 'DM2024_Interim_Vitals' for the 'Phase II Diabetes Trial' study that includes the Vital Signs CRF items from the Baseline Assessment event. Export and download the resulting data file in CSV or tab-delimited format to /home/ga/Downloads.
